base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_clock_stopwatch — a pickup_item from 1986 legend of zelda. Stopwatch / Clock — stuns all enemies on-screen briefly. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Stopwatch / Clock — stuns all enemies on-screen briefly; drops from rare enemies
